routes.name: route.match.static
routes.measures: match only; pattern is parsed before timing

routes.name: route.match.param
routes.measures: string parameter match only; pattern is parsed before timing

routes.name: route.match.int_param
routes.measures: integer parameter match only; pattern is parsed before timing

routes.name: route.match.multi_param
routes.measures: multi-parameter match only; pattern is parsed before timing

routes.name: route.match.no_match
routes.measures: failed match path; no match params are allocated
